name: Glycolysis
description: Glycolysis: glucose is invested with two ATP and committed at phosphofructokinase-1, split into triose phosphates, then oxidized to yield NADH and a net two ATP and two pyruvate, with PFK-1 allosterically gated by the cell's energy charge.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Glucose"]
    N2["Hexokinase -> G6P"]
    N3["Isomerize -> F6P"]
    N4["PFK-1 -> F1,6BP"]
    N5["Aldolase: 2 triose-P"]
    N6["GAPDH: NAD+ -> NADH"]
    N7["Payoff: ATP via PGK/PK"]
    N8{"Energy charge high?"}
    N9["2 Pyruvate (net 2 ATP)"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 --> N8
    N8 -->|ATP high: inhib…| N4
    N8 -->|proceed| N9

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
